surfaces_and_borders.card: bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/5 rounded-none hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:bg-slate-900/60 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_borders.button_primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
surfaces_and_borders.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:border-white/50 transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center

animations.page_load: framer-motion initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, staggerChildren 0.1
animations.scroll: framer-motion whileInView opacity-1 y-0, initial opacity-0 y-8, viewport once: true
animations.reduced_motion: respect prefers-reduced-motion using tailwind motion-safe variant

components.navbar: Sticky header. Logo: 'MIR Consulting' in Outfit font, bold. Desktop links with hover:text-blue-400. CTA 'Book Consultation'.
components.hero: Dark abstract geometric background (10-20% opacity). Left-aligned content: overline, H1, subtext, CTA group.
components.trust_indicators: Muted grid of industry domains/capabilities below hero.
components.services_preview: Grid of cards. Each card uses 1px subtle border, Phosphor duotone icon, heading, text, and 'Learn more' link.
components.industries_bento: Bento layout. Mix of image-background cards with dark overlays and solid color info cards.
components.contact_form: Shadcn UI form components. Dark inputs (bg-transparent, border-white/20). Focus states must use border-blue-500.
components.admin_dashboard: Clean, dense data table using Shadcn Table component. Solid dark background, distinct from marketing pages.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue geometric lines. Apply opacity-20 and blend-screen for a subtle corporate tech feel.
Corporate office meeting. Professional consulting scenario.
Logistics and warehouse facility for industry deep dive.
Glowing neon blue optical fibers for IT consulting visuals.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio. Text over images MUST have text-shadow or a dark overlay (bg-black/60).
accessibility_and_testing.interactive: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover, active, and focus states. Focus ring should be blue-500.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the website as a hybrid_fullstack application with pages: Home, About, Services, Industries, Case Studies, Insights, Contact, and Admin.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via next/font or standard HTML.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layout structures to allow asymmetrical bento grids and custom borders.
Use Shadcn UI components ONLY for forms (Input, Textarea, Form, Button) and Dashboard elements (Table, Tabs).
Implement Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations across sections.
Enforce a sharp, enterprise-grade aesthetic by avoiding rounded corners (use rounded-none).
Never use generic placeholder text/images; integrate the Unsplash URLs provided.
Add 'data-testid' to every button, link, and form input.
